title: DevOps Lead
description: CloudMesh is a B2B SaaS company serving 1,500 enterprise clients. Our DevOps Lead will own the entire platform engineering function, defining the roadmap for infrastructure, security, and developer experience. You'll manage 2 engineers and report directly to the CTO.
responsibilities: Own end-to-end platform reliability for 99.9% uptime SLA
Lead and grow a team of 2 platform engineers
Drive SOC2 Type II compliance programme
Build developer golden path reducing new service setup from weeks to hours
